---
title: "Project Report"
subtitle: "Building a RAG System I Can Explain — Completion"
author: "Alan McDonagh (A00052777)"
date: today
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
number-sections: false
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pathlib
content = pathlib.Path("../docs/_source/output_report.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
lines = content.split("\n")
body_lines = []
in_body = False
for line in lines:
    if not in_body and line.startswith("## 1 "):
        in_body = True
    if in_body:
        body_lines.append(line)
from IPython.display import Markdown
Markdown("\n".join(body_lines))
```
